_notes: Per-vendor / per-refrigerant additional-charge factors (kg of refrigerant
per metre of liquid line of a given OD). Used by RefrigerantPipeSolver.ComputeAdditionalCharge
to estimate the field-charge addition for the run beyond the factory charge.
Daikin / Mitsubishi / Toshiba publish vendor-specific tables in their VRV /
City Multi / SHRMe data books. Mid-2024 values shipped here as a sample;
project teams should override per their installed series via
Liquid lines only — gas/discharge lines don't carry significant
additional charge in normal operation. CO₂ + R134a tables omitted as
they're chiller-side rather than per-pipe-length distribution.

tables.label: Daikin VRV IV-S R410A liquid charge per m
tables.source: Daikin VRV IV-S 2021 Eng Data Book §4.5.2
